EXPRESS DINE
For your convenience, United is pleased to offer an expedited primary meal
dining experience allowing you to make the most of your time onboard.
You can choose to have your starter, salad and entrﾃｩe selection
served all at once, followed by dessert.
beginnings
GRILLED SHRIMP BROCHETTE WITH SUGAR CANE SKEWER
Over mango and tomato relish
SEASONAL MIXED GREENS
Creamy Garlic or Balsamic Vinaigrette
main course
FILET MIGNON WITH HERBED COMPOUND BUTTER 1
Garlic red skin mashed potatoes and grilled asparagus
SATE SPICED CHICKEN
Jasmine rice with chives and a medley of vegetables
STIR-FRIED SHRIMP AND SCALLOPS OVER BRAISED EGG NOODLES
Garlic oyster sauce and baby bok choy
If your entrﾃｩe comes with a sauce and you prefer to have it served on the side in
a ramekin, please inform your flight attendant when indicating your dining preferences.
to finish
ARTISAN CHEESE SELECTION
Served with red grapes and crackers
San Joaquin Gold, Le Cabrie
ICE CREAM
midflight snack
BOAR'S HEADﾂｰ ROAST BEEF SANDWICH
With cheddar cheese and horseradish spread on multigrain bread
FRESH TOMATO, MOZZARELLA AND BASIL CAPRESE SANDWICH
With basil aﾃｯoli on a ciabatta roll
ALL NATURAL POPCHIPSﾂｮ
TOBLERONE CHOCOLATE BAR

FRESH TRUT

prior to arrival
